user.title: Monimoto
user.description:
Enter your Monimoto account email address. You will receive a verification code by email.

Leave 'API password' blank to use the built-in default. If you see a 417 error, you need to capture your phone's traffic (see README) and paste the correct password here.

authorize.title: Confirm email code
authorize.description: Enter the verification code sent to {email}.
